title: Legend of the Lucky Blocks
description: All lucky blocks are gathered in one place.
body:
# All lucky blocks are gathered in one place!!
### This mod aims to integrate the legendary Lucky Block that was developed back in 2016.
>  






Currently implemented Lucky Blocks are the [Inca Luck Block](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/inca-lucky-block) and the [Snake Lucky Block](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/snake-lucky-block). Thank you, [Sokoly](https://www.curseforge.com/members/_sokoly_/projects), for your support in development.


We're looking forward to seeing you join the new Lucky Block! If you'd like to join, please send us a message.
